response.text:

rationale: Your SoC is 0.30 (below our 0.5 minimum threshold) and neighborhood is in collective crisis—sharing now risks our own islanded survival; r2c2 must preserve reserves.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.5, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Neighborhood is in collective energy crisis; all peers below 45% SoC and requesting. r2c2 must halt outbound sharing immediately to survive islanded operation..
